outputs.description: Unique ID of the alert. DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.id Unique ID of the watchlist.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.alertId

outputs.description: Type of the watchlist. DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.name Name of the watchlist.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.type

outputs.description: String containing the ID of external topic for watchlist type. DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.userProperties.omnilist String containing the boolean value of omnilist.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.externalTopicIds

outputs.description: Type of the watchlist on the Dataminr platform. DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.userProperties.watchlistColor Color of the watchlist defined on the Dataminr platform.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.watchlistsMatchedByType.userProperties.uiListType

outputs.description: Whether the alert has related alerts or not. DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventTime Timestamp of the event.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.availableRelatedAlerts

outputs.description: Volume of the event. DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventLocation.coordinates Latitude and Longitude of the event.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventVolume

outputs.description: The name of the place where the event occurred. DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventLocation.places Place IDs of the event location.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventLocation.name

outputs.description: Radius of the event location. DataminrPulse.Alerts.source.displayName The display name of the source.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventLocation.radius

outputs.description: The entity name of the source. DataminrPulse.Alerts.source.verified True if the source is verified, false otherwise.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.source.entityName

outputs.description: The Dataminr channel to which the source belongs. DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.timestamp The timestamp of the post.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.source.channels

outputs.description: The position of the post. DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.languages.lang The language of the post.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.languages.position

outputs.description: The type of the media. DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.url The URL of the media.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.type

outputs.description: The description of the media. DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.display_url The display URL of the media.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.description

outputs.description: The URL of the media. DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.source The source of the media.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.media.media_url

outputs.description: The link to the post. DataminrPulse.Alerts.caption The text of the alert.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.post.link

outputs.description: The name of the category to which the alert belongs. DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.topicType The type of the Dataminr entity. Its value will be "category".
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.name

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the category. DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.idStr The string value of the ID for the category.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.id

outputs.description: String containing the boolean value for a category. DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.path The path of the Dataminr category.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.requested

outputs.description: Boolean value of retired for a particular category. DataminrPulse.Alerts.headerColor The hex value of the alert's header color.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.categories.retired

outputs.description: The label of the alert's header. DataminrPulse.Alerts.alertType.id The unique identifier of the alert type.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.headerLabel

outputs.description: The name of the alert type. DataminrPulse.Alerts.alertType.color The color of alert type.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.alertType.name

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the publisher category. DataminrPulse.Alerts.publisherCategory.name The name of the publisher category.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.publisherCategory.id

outputs.description: The color of the publisher category. DataminrPulse.Alerts.publisherCategory.shortName The short name for publisher category.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.publisherCategory.color

outputs.description: Value containing the URL of the small event map image. DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventMapLargeURL Value containing the URL of the large event map image.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.eventMapSmallURL

outputs.description: URL of the alert details page. DataminrPulse.Alerts.expandMapURL URL of the expanded map.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.expandAlertURL

outputs.description: Text of the related terms. DataminrPulse.Alerts.relatedTerms.url URL of the related terms.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.relatedTerms.text

outputs.description: URL of the related terms query. DataminrPulse.Alerts.parentAlertId Alert ID of the parent.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.relatedTermsQueryURL

outputs.description: Identifier for a specific part of a website referenced in posts that could be related to a target or attacker's infrastructure. DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.threats Name of cyber threat.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.URLs

outputs.description: IP address of attacker/victim. Note that IP can have more than one open port and ports are associated with specific products via IANA (iana.org). DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.addresses.port Port of attacker/victim.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.addresses.ip

outputs.description: Version of IP address. DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.asns Name of the autonomous systems number of the company hosting the impacted service(s).
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.addresses.version

outputs.description: Name of the ASN (company hosting the impacted service). DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.products The server software used on an IP address.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.orgs

outputs.description: A unique identifier or fingerprint for a file, often a malicious executable. DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.malwares Malicious software posing a threat.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.hashes

outputs.description: Autonomous system number. DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.asOrgs.asOrg Autonomous system organization.
outputs.name: DataminrPulse.Alerts.metadata.cyber.asOrgs.asn
